name: Proton Persona
description: The Proton Persona is a B-segment sedan produced by Malaysian automobile manufacturer Proton since 2007. Full ECU documentation for engine management and transmission systems.

name: Proton Saga
description: The Proton Saga is a series of subcompact cars produced by Proton. It is the first Malaysian car and a staple in the local market. ECU details include wiring diagrams for various generations.

name: Proton X50
description: A popular subcompact crossover SUV. Extensive diagnostic and ECU documentation for modern GDI engine management systems.

name: Proton X70
description: Compact crossover SUV. Comprehensive technical data for Bosch and other ECU components used in the direct injection turbo engines.

name: Proton Iriz
description: Five-door subcompact hatchback. Documentation covers engine bay wiring, sensor pinouts, and diagnostic codes.
